name: Crab and Shrimp Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, and pepper with 1 cup of milk in a bowl. Stir until smooth.
2. In the top of a double boiler, combine cheese spread and remaining milk. Cook over hot water until the cheese melts.
3. Add the flour mixture and Tabasco sauce to the melted cheese mixture. Stir until smooth.
4. Add shrimp and crabmeat to the mixture. Pour into a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Top with shredded cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Serve over hot cooked rice.
